brand.name: Tabador Translation Est.
brand.tagline: Certified Translation You Can Rely On
brand.taglineSub: Your documents accepted the first time — every time.
brand.description: Tabador Translation Est. is a certified translation office in Dammam, Saudi Arabia. We provide accurate, fast, and officially recognized translations accepted by all government authorities and embassies inside and outside the Kingdom.
brand.certNote: We certify the fidelity of the translation, not the content of the original document.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hello, I would like to request a certified translation. Document type:
contact.address: Opposite Jawazat (Passport Office), Dammam 31952, P.O. Box 73612, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
